phases.name: Quiet
phases.description: Standing still; force represents body weight

phases.name: Concentric
phases.description: Concentric phase from contraction start to take-off

phases.name: Flight
phases.description: Airborne; force plate reads near zero

value.name: Quiet
value.description: Standing still; force represents body weight

quiet.explanation: Standing still; force reflects body weight.

value.name: Concentric
value.description: Concentric phase from contraction start to take-off

concentric.explanation: Push upwards; force rises through P1 and P2 peaks.

value.name: Flight
value.description: Airborne; force plate reads near zero

flight.explanation: Airborne; force plate reads near zero.

take_off.explanation: Last instant of contact before flight; force leaves baseline.

landing.explanation: First instant of contact after flight; force near takeoff level.

peak_landing_force.explanation: Highest force within ~150 ms of landing contact.

contraction_time_s.explanation: Duration from contraction start to take-off (s).

flight_time_s.explanation: Time airborne from take-off to landing (s).

jump_height_m.explanation: Jump height from flight time formula: g × T²/8 (m).

jump_height_impulse_m.explanation: Jump height from impulse-momentum method: v²/(2g), v = impulse/mass (m).

peak_force_N.explanation: Peak vertical force during concentric phase (N).

peak_force_pct_bw.explanation: Peak concentric force as percentage of bodyweight (%).

mean_force_pct_bw.explanation: Mean concentric force as percentage of bodyweight (%).

max_rfd_N_s.explanation: Peak rate of force development during concentric phase (N/s).

time_to_max_rfd_s.explanation: Time from contraction start to peak RFD (s).

impulse_Ns.explanation: Impulse (integral of F − BW) from contraction start to take-off (N·s).

time_to_peak_s.explanation: Time from contraction start to peak force (s).

rsi_mod.explanation: Modified reactive strength index: jump height (flight) / contraction time (m/s).

bimodality_index.explanation: Absolute difference between two peaks if bimodal force curve (N).

trough_depth_N.explanation: Force drop from higher peak to trough between peaks (bimodal takeoff strategy) (N).

sj_classification.explanation: Squat jump classification: optimal_squat_jump or injured_or_fatigued_squat_jump.
